items.title: Know About Index Funds? This Simple Strategy Would Have Beaten the Pros This Year.
items.author: Jeremy Bowman
items.description: The S&P 500 is on track to have one of its best performances in decades, up 26.2% so far in 2024. Wall Street's forecasts have been wildly off, with hedge funds and macro funds underperforming the index. Investing in an S&P 500 index fund is an easy way for individual investors to capitalize on the market's gains and beat the pros.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Investing in an S&P 500 index fund like the SPDR S&P 500 ETF is an easy way for individual investors to capitalize on the market's gains and beat the pros.
Investing in an S&P 500 index fund like the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF is an easy way for individual investors to capitalize on the market's gains and beat the pros.
